---

Now that you have your stories, you're ready to move on to part two. If you still need to schedule a time to meet with your partner, now is the time to do so. You will need about three uninterrupted hours together to complete part two. Arrange to meet in a place where you can focus and where you can have an open and honest conversation. And be sure that wherever you meet has reliable internet access so we can continue to guide you through the process. Before you meet, print out the partner guide from the link below. It lists the titles of your stories and has a place for your partner to take notes.
